products.name: Lumo Family
products.descriptor: Hyperspectral data acquisition and analysis software suite

products.name: CaliGeo PRO
products.descriptor: Georectification and calibration software for airborne hyperspectral data

unresolved_questions: All 15 individual product detail pages were skipped (skipped_class_budget or skipped_budget), so per-product specs beyond name and spectral range are not available from the corpus. Readiness set to 'production' based on presence in the public product catalog; no 'coming soon' language was observed on the products overview page.
No NDAA or Blue UAS compliance claims were found anywhere in the fetched corpus. Specim is a Finnish company (Oulu, Finland), so NDAA compliance is non-obvious and left as 'unknown'.

CaliGeo PRO granularity set to 'sku' as it appears to be a single named product; Lumo Family set to 'family' as the name implies a multi-product software suite — these assessments could not be verified without the individual product pages.

fetch_requests.reason: Individual product page for Specim AFX10 drone hyperspectral camera; would provide weight, power draw, interface specs, and any NDAA/compliance language.
Individual product page for Specim AFX17 drone hyperspectral camera; would provide detailed specs and any compliance claims.
Individual product page for AisaFENIX airborne hyperspectral camera; would confirm airborne system specs and any compliance claims.
Individual product page for AisaFENIX 1K airborne hyperspectral camera; would confirm specs and distinguish from base AisaFENIX.
Individual product page for CaliGeo PRO software; would confirm it is georectification/calibration software for airborne data and provide any licensing/compliance info.
Individual product page for Lumo Family software; would enumerate the members of the family and clarify scope.
